name: file_event_win_desktop_ini_created_by_uncommon_process
raw_query: any where file.path:"*\\desktop.ini" and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Windows\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*")) or file.path:"C:\\$WINDOWS.~BT\\NewOS\\*")) and (not ((process.executable:"C:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\JetBrains\\Toolbox\\bin\\7z.exe" and file.path:"*\\JetBrains\\apps\\*") or (process.executable:"C:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\*")))
